title: Hello World 1111111
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post More info: Writing screw1 screw2 screw3 screw3 Run server More info: Server Generate static files More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites More info: Deployment
批量set get 赋值 缘由：开发采集系统，无奈表很多，表字段更多，系统需要给别的项目提供服务，接大量的参数然后赋值给本系统实体，若一个一个的去手写不仅浪费时间，效率低下，还极易有可能漏参数，出错误，由此，特地编写了一个针对此项目开发的一个脚本。
